chunks.text:
Kingdom By MAG

Kingdom by MAG operates under MAG Group Holding with heritage dating to 1978, providing comprehensive real estate services including buying, selling, investment advisory, and golden visa assistance across Dubai's property market.

Tagline: Your trusted real estate partner for buying, selling, and investing in Dubai

Services:
- Property buying and selling
- Off-plan and secondary market property sales
- Real estate investment advisory
- Property management and post-purchase support
- Mortgage and financing guidance
- Golden Visa assistance

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: 585559090
- Email: k.altouma@kingdombymag.ae
- Website: https://www.kingdombymag.ae/
- Address: Dubai, UAE
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kingdombymag/

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Kingdom By MAG — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Services: - Property buying and selling
- Off-plan and secondary market property sales
- Real estate investment advisory
- Property management and post-purchase support
- Mortgage and financing guidance
- Golden Visa assistance

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at 585559090 or k.altouma@kingdombymag.ae
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Kingdom By MAG**! How can I help you find your perfect property?
